cta_title: Ready to Start Your Custom Cards Project?
cta_subtitle: Get a quote within 24 hours. No minimum order quantity for samples.
about_hero_subtitle: Focus on Printing · Service with Heart · Create Brilliance
about_text1: Founded in 2003 and based in Shenzhen, we have been serving the printing industry for over 20 years. We are a comprehensive printing service provider integrating development, prototyping, design, printing, processing, and packaging.
about_text2:
Specialized in custom printing of cards, books, board games, puzzles and other paper products. Our product range includes:
- Playing Cards (advertising decks, custom poker cards, casino-grade cards)
- Tarot Cards (Waite Tarot, Thoth Tarot, Marseilles Tarot, art collector's edition)
- Holographic Cards (full holographic, spot holographic, foil-stamped)
- Learning Cards (flashcards, cognitive cards, word cards, early education cards)
- Board Game Cards (strategy cards, character cards, item cards, event cards, etc.)
- Hardcover Books, paperback books, kids' puzzles, and more

With an annual production capacity exceeding 3 million sets, we serve customers in over 50 countries and regions, and have worked with more than 1,000 clients worldwide.
about_text3: Located in Shenzhen, we have easy access to Yantian International Port, Shekou Port, and Bao'an International Airport, giving us a complete sea-air-land logistics network. This ensures fast, efficient shipping and reliable delivery times. We are certified with ISO9001, ISO9002, ISO14001, FSC, SEDEX, G7 and other international quality and environmental management standards. From raw material sourcing to finished product delivery, every step is strictly controlled to guarantee quality. You can trust us with your printing needs.
values_subtitle: Customer First · Quality Focus · Integrity & Trust · Innovation & Growth

category_cards_desc: Custom playing cards, tarot cards, holographic cards, flashcards and more. Premium quality with various finishes including gloss, matte, UV coating, and foil stamping. Perfect for casinos, promotions, collectors, and educational purposes. Low MOQ available with fast turnaround.
category_books_desc: Hardcover, paperback, pop-up, perfect bound books, product catalogs, and picture books. Custom sizes, premium paper stocks, and professional binding. Ideal for coffee table books, children's books, art books, and corporate publications. Free design consultation available.
category_boardgames_desc: Custom board game printing including cards, rulebooks, game boards, and custom boxes. Perfect for crowdfunding campaigns, family games, and strategy games. We handle everything from prototyping to mass production with high-quality components and packaging.
category_puzzles_desc: Custom puzzles for all ages - children's puzzles, wooden puzzles, 3D puzzles, and floor puzzles. Educational and entertaining designs with eco-friendly materials. Perfect for gifts, educational toys, and promotional items. Custom shapes and sizes available.
free_sample_desc: Request a free sample to see our quality →

craft_subtitle: Premium materials and finishes for your custom cards
material_desc: Choose from a variety of high-quality paper stocks
material1_desc: 310gsm-330gsm, black core or blue core, excellent snap and durability.
material2_desc: 300gsm-350gsm, coated or uncoated, ideal for tarot and collectible cards.
material3_desc: Waterproof, tear-resistant, available in various thicknesses (0.3mm-0.8mm).
material4_desc: FSC certified, recycled paper options for environmentally conscious brands.
finish_desc: Protective coatings and textures for the perfect feel
finish1_desc: High shine, vibrant colors, scratch resistant.
finish2_desc: Non-glare, elegant look, smooth to touch.
finish4_desc: High gloss, ultra durable, spot UV available.
process_desc: Advanced printing technologies for stunning results
process1_desc: High quality, cost-effective for large quantities, Pantone color matching.
process2_desc: Fast turnaround, no minimum order, perfect for prototypes and small batches.
process3_desc: Gold, silver, holographic, and custom color foils.
process4_desc: Raised or indented textures for premium tactile experience.
process5_desc: Custom shapes and sizes, round corners, perforations.
process6_desc: Unique codes, QR codes, or text on each card.
craft_cta_title: Need Help Choosing the Right Options?
craft_cta_subtitle: Our experts are here to guide you through the selection process.
material5_desc: Elegant crosshatch pattern, premium feel for luxury card games.
material6_desc: Natural brown, eco-friendly, great for rustic or vintage designs.
finish5_desc: Velvety smooth texture, luxurious and fingerprint resistant.
finish6_desc: High-gloss varnish on selected areas for contrast and depth.
